name: Graphics
summary: Class encapsulating API for the rendering of client graphics.

methods.name: Text2D
methods.signature: Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.TextExtents2D Text2D(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.TextFontInfo fontInfo, string text, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D origin, int offsetX, int offsetY)
methods.summary: Renders 2D text.Text is rendered in 2D as bitmaps. It always faces the viewer.

methods.name: CanRenderText2D
methods.summary: Check to see if you can render a given text string with given font info.

methods.name: InternalCreator
methods.signature: static Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Graphics InternalCreator(nint handleIn, Autodesk.Navisworks.Internal.ApiImplementation.NativeHandleOwnership ownership, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.NativeHandle parent)

methods.name: Arc
methods.signature: void Arc(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D centre, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D end, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D arc in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the arc be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Arc
methods.signature: void Arc(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D center, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D end, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D normal, bool filled)

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the arc be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: BeginModelContext
methods.summary: Begin rendering in the Model Context.

methods.name: BeginUserContext
methods.summary: Begin rendering in a user-defined context.

methods.name: BeginWindowContext
methods.summary: Begin rendering in the Window Context.

methods.name: BezierSegment
methods.signature: void BezierSegment(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D control, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D end)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D segment of a 3rd order Bezier curve.

methods.name: BezierSegment
methods.signature: void BezierSegment(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D control, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D end, int resolution)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D segment of a 3rd order Bezier curve.

params.name: resolution
params.doc: Number of points to evaluate along the Bezier.

methods.name: Bitmap
methods.signature: void Bitmap(int index, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D origin, double alpha)

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of the registered bitmap to render.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Overall alpha value for the bitmap.

methods.name: Bitmap
methods.signature: void Bitmap(int index, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D origin, uint width, uint height, double alpha)

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of the registered bitmap to render.

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the image you want to render.

params.name: height
params.doc: Height of the image you want to render.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Overall alpha value for the bitmap.

methods.name: Circle
methods.signature: void Circle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D centre, double radius, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D circle in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the circle be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Circle
methods.signature: void Circle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D centre, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D normal, double radius, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 3D circle in the model space.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the circle be filled in or an outline.

params.name: alphaValue
params.doc: Alpha value. Range of 0.0 to 1.0. 0.0 is fully transparent, 1.0 is fully opaque.

methods.name: Cone
methods.signature: void Cone(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D end, double startRadius, double endRadius)

params.name: startRadius
params.doc: Radius at start point of cone.

params.name: endRadius
params.doc: Radius at end point of cone.

methods.name: Cuboid
methods.signature: void Cuboid(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D origin, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D xVector, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D yVector, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D zVector, bool filled)

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the cuboid be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Cylinder
methods.signature: void Cylinder(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D start, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D end, double radius)

methods.name: DepthMask
methods.summary: Enables or disables depth buffer writing.

params.name: depthMaskOn
params.doc: Should writing to the depth buffer be enabled.

methods.name: Ellipse
methods.signature: void Ellipse(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D centre, double xRadius, double yRadius, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D axis-aligned ellipse in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the ellipse be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Ellipse
methods.signature: void Ellipse(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D centre, double xRadius, double yRadius, bool filled, int resolution)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D axis-aligned ellipse in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the ellipse be filled in or an outline.

params.name: resolution
params.doc: Number of points used to draw ellipse.

methods.name: EndModelContext
methods.summary: End rendering in the Model context.

methods.name: EndUserContext
methods.summary: End rendering in the User context.

methods.name: EndWindowContext
methods.summary: End rendering in the Window Context.

methods.name: Line
methods.summary: Renders a 2D line in the XY plane at the current depth.

methods.name: LineStipple
methods.summary: Sets the current line stipple mode.

params.name: factor
params.doc: Factor to stretch pattern by. May be clamped.

params.name: pattern
params.doc: Bit pattern to stipple line with.

methods.name: Point
methods.summary: Renders a 2D point in the XY plane at the current depth.

methods.name: Polyline2D
methods.summary: Renders a 2D polyline in the XY plane at the current depth.

methods.name: Rectangle
methods.signature: void Rectangle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D bottomLeft, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D topRight, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D rectangle in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the rectangle be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Rectangle
methods.signature: void Rectangle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D origin, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D xVector, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Vector3D yVector, bool filled)

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the rectangle be filled in or an outline.

params.name: imageId
params.doc: image index registered by Application.RegisterBitmap API.

methods.name: TextureCoordinate
methods.summary: Specifies texture co-ordinate for next polygon vertex.

methods.name: Triangle
methods.signature: void Triangle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D point1, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D point2, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point2D point3, bool filled)
methods.summary: Renders a 2D triangle in the XY plane at the current Z depth.

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the triangle be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: Triangle
methods.signature: void Triangle(Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D point1, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D point2, Autodesk.Navisworks.Api.Point3D point3, bool filled)

params.name: filled
params.doc: Should the triangle be filled in or an outline.

methods.name: VertexColor
methods.summary: Specifies color of next polygon vertex.

methods.name: VertexNormal
methods.summary: Specifies normal of next polygon vertex.

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the object is read-only.
